name: HSR Team Builder
summary: Personal web project for building and exploring Honkai: Star Rail team compositions with character and light cone data.
highlights: Designed as a practical tool for comparing team options and improving decision-making workflows
Uses structured data to support character, light cone, and team-building references
Serves as a personal space to practice frontend development, QA thinking, automation, and AI-assisted workflow improvements

name: ani-cli-mx
summary: Personal CLI project focused on improving terminal-based anime search and playback workflows.
highlights: Maintained and customized CLI behavior for personal workflow improvements
Worked with shell scripting, debugging, and source handling
Practiced Linux tooling, Git workflows, and iterative testing
